notes: The Miracle of Istanbul — 3-0 down at half-time, six-minute comeback for the ages.
Revenge for Istanbul — Inzaghi's brace, Kaká's vintage season.
Rain-soaked Moscow final — Terry's slip, Anelka's miss, United's third European Cup.
Pep's first European crown — Puyol moved to RB, Yaya Touré improvising at CB.
Mourinho's Italian treble — Milito's brace, Eto'o tracking back as a defensive RW.
Peak tiki-taka — Mascherano repurposed as a centre-back, Wembley masterclass.
Di Matteo's miracle — Terry suspended, Bertrand handed his Chelsea debut at LM.
All-German final at Wembley — Robben's redemption goal in the 89th.
Klopp's gegenpressing BVB — Götze ruled out injured, Reus shifted central.
MSN delivers a second treble — Luis Enrique's most fearsome front three.
Madrid derby in Milan — Pepe paired with Ramos, Zidane's first European trophy.
First back-to-back CL win — Isco preferred over Bale in the latter's home city.
Three-peat sealed in Kyiv — Bale's bicycle kick off the bench, Karius's nightmare.
Klopp's first European crown at Anfield — Salah penalty inside two minutes.
Spurs' only European Cup final — Kane rushed back from injury, Lucas Moura on the bench.
Pandemic-bubble final in Lisbon — Kimmich at right-back, Coman's header sinks his boyhood club.
Courtois' masterclass — Benzema's Ballon d'Or year, three knockout comebacks before this one.
City's continental treble — Akanji in for the injured Walker, Rodri's only goal of the night.
Iconic Premier League restart after the COVID-19 shutdown.
Final-day win that sealed Milan's return to the Champions League after a seven-season absence. Kessié scored both goals from the penalty spot (43', 90'+3').
2010 World Cup semifinal. Van Bronckhorst opened the scoring with one of the greatest World Cup goals ever. Netherlands advanced to the final to face Spain.
Tadić's 69th-minute goal won it at Old Trafford. Part of Southampton's brilliant 2014-15 season under Ronald Koeman.
2022 World Cup Round of 16. Morocco became the first African nation to reach the quarterfinals since Ghana 2010. Spain missed all three penalties — Sarabia, Soler, and Busquets.
Opening weekend of 2017-18. A stunning away win at Stamford Bridge — Vokes scored twice and Ward added a third. One of the biggest upsets of that Premier League season.
Championship fixture during Villa's relegation-era rebuild. Adomah, Kodjia, and Gestede (pen, 90') scored. Grealish was Player of the Match — an early glimpse of what was to come.
A statement win during Leicester's historic title-winning season. Mahrez, Huth (x2) scored. Vardy and Kanté were unplayable. Huth scored twice from set pieces — classic Ranieri Leicester.

2018 World Cup opening match on home soil. Cheryshev came off the bench and scored twice. Golovin (9.4 rating, POTM) capped the rout in stoppage time with a free kick — one of the tournament's breakout performances.
Sergio Ramos scored an OG and then equalised with a 90'+5 pen to make it 3-2 — but Sevilla held on. Ben Yedder and Layún also scored. Asensio was POTM despite being on the losing side.
Coupe de France semifinal. Ben Yedder opened from the spot (54') and Volland sealed it (61'). Tchouaméni and Fofana in the same midfield — both would go on to Real Madrid within two years.

UCL Round of 16 second leg. Arsenal overturned a 2-1 first leg deficit with a stunning 5-0. Bendtner hat-trick (9', 25', 90'+1 pen) — one of the great individual UCL performances of the era. Nasri and Eboué also scored.
Final day of the 2016-17 season. Feghouli (27') and Ayew (72') won it for West Ham. Slaven Bilić's side finishing a turbulent first season at the London Stadium.
FA Cup fourth round upset at Anfield. Jay Rodriguez scored twice (11', 7') and Vokes added a third. Matip OG and Salah replied but wasn't enough.
Firmino (9'), Mané (40'), Wijnaldum (90'+1) won it. Screenshot partially cut off on the left — Mané and Wijnaldum inferred from match records.
FA Cup third round north London derby. Cazorla (31') and Rosický (62') scored. A young Gnabry (#44) started on the left.
Richarlison brace (38', 60'), Udogie (26'), and Son pen (85'). Son rated 9.5 — POTM. Ange Postecoglou's Spurs in full flow.
Isaac Hayden's 90'+4 winner. Classic Steve Bruce low-block. Saint-Maximin caused chaos from the right.
Jorginho (83') and Abraham (87') came from behind to win it after Aubameyang's opener. Lampard's Chelsea grinding out a result at the Emirates.
Rooney hat-trick (18', 28', 66') plus Williams (78'). Rooney's return to Everton that season — this was his best performance.
Eli Junior Kroupi (17') and Alex Scott (74') won it. Győkeres replied from the spot for Arsenal (35'). Impressive away win for Bournemouth.
Patrick Bamford hat-trick (55', 67', 74'). Leeds' first Premier League season back — Bielsa's side at their relentless best. Bamford with a 9.5 rating.
Wesley Moraes brace (14', 30'), Grealish (49'), Hourihane (61'), Douglas Luiz (83'). Grealish (c) with a dominant away performance.
One of the biggest upsets of the 2019-20 season. McLean (18'), Cantwell (28'), Pukki (50') beat the champions. Agüero and Rodri replied but it wasn't enough.
